productDisplayName: Gini and Jony Girls Happy Style Blue Leggings
description: Style Note A pint sized version of her mother's ensemble, this soft pair of leggings are just the right thing for your little girl this summer. Style ths with comfy top and let her experience the enchanced comfort of Gini & Jony clothes - she'll never want to wear anything else! Product Details Full-length turquoise blue leggings, has a soft elastication at the waist and tapers at the ankles Material and Care 100% cotton Machine wash separately in cold water using a mild detergent Do not bleach or soak Line dry inside out in shade Warm iron only Do not iron directly on print/embroidery
